# Frontend Instructions (React + TanStack)

## Purpose
Maintain clean, reusable, and structured frontend code.

---

## Component Rules
- Keep components small and focused
- Separate UI from logic when possible
- Reuse components instead of duplicating
- Use clear and descriptive names

---

## Structure
- Components → UI only
- Hooks → logic reuse
- Pages → layout and composition

---

## State Management
- Keep state minimal
- Avoid deeply nested state
- Use TanStack Query for data fetching
- Avoid redundant API calls

---

## Do NOT
- Put backend logic in frontend
- Directly access database
- Mix heavy logic into UI components

---

## Styling
- Keep styles consistent
- Avoid duplication
- Use reusable patterns
- Keep class names readable

---

## Performance
- Avoid unnecessary re-renders
- Memoize when appropriate
- Keep components lightweight

---

## Output Expectations
- Clean component structure
- Clear props
- Readable layout
- No unnecessary complexity
